kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY VOLCANO ACTIVITY NOTIFICATION
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Precursory low-level eruptive activity before episode 9 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption began around 4:10 a.m. HST on Sunday June 1.Low dome fountains fed a short lava flow that ended at 4:30 a.m. HST.No volcanic plume or ash produced.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
